name: Folate
summary: Folate is essential for DNA synthesis and one-carbon metabolism, with strong evidence for neural tube defect prevention.
description: Folate (vitamin B9) supports DNA synthesis and repair via nucleotide methylation and one-carbon metabolism, impacting cell turnover and genomic stability.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
